mentions.note: Caller Leslie: Dover rallied to $237 (too high), now $210. Cramer likes but had huge run; buy some at 210, more at 200, 190 on way down. Scale in on pullback.
Preferred over Flowserve; pipes and valves very similar to what Roper used to be; recently had great quarter.
Reports Jan 29; CEO Rich Tobin doing terrific job but stock up 5 pts recently. Wait for earnings before positioning.
